name: ffi_shellrun_exit
notes: Effect beyond Println/Exit: ShellRun (a synchronous shell command whose result is a StringResult) chained with Exit(0) in one tick. Proves a non-Println/Exit OS effect is emitted AND ordered correctly with a following Exit (mode-1 literal Seq order). ShellRun is not in the FFI-construction ban list, so no `external` needed. The shell command's C side effect is dispatch, not part of the transition relation; the contract unit is the emitted ordered effect list. Doubly-witnessed: CurrentRuntime probe sat_runs_then_exits + SmtLib Method A/B.
